def f(L):
    N = len(L)
    for k in range(1, N//2 + 1):
        i = k - 1
        j = N - k
        while i < j:
            # swap elements:
            L[i], L[j] = L[j], L[i]
            # update i, j:
            i += 1
            j -= 1
    return L
